news.title:
SAIL supplied indigenous special steel for INS Taragiri, boosting India's defence sector.
The stealth frigate reflects India's strategic strength and confidence in domestic manufacturing.
news.summary:
SAIL supplied indigenous special steel for INS Taragiri, boosting India's defence sector.
The stealth frigate reflects India's strategic strength and confidence in domestic manufacturing.

news.title:
SAIL's FY26 sales rose 11.5% to 20.14 MT, with crude steel output at 19.43 MT.
Exports surged 162% to 2.9 lakh tonnes, with new markets like Bhutan.
news.summary:
SAIL's FY26 sales rose 11.5% to 20.14 MT, with crude steel output at 19.43 MT.
Exports surged 162% to 2.9 lakh tonnes, with new markets like Bhutan.

news.title:
Amarendu Prakash resigns as CMD of Steel Authority of India.
No detailed analysis or commentary was provided in the news update.
news.summary:
Amarendu Prakash resigns as CMD of Steel Authority of India.
No detailed analysis or commentary was provided in the news update.

news.title:
SAIL Chairman & MD Shri Amarendu Prakash resigns effective 1 April 2026.
Krishna Kumar Singh appointed interim Chairman & MD for 3 months from 2 April 2026.
news.summary:
SAIL Chairman & MD Shri Amarendu Prakash resigns effective 1 April 2026.
Krishna Kumar Singh appointed interim Chairman & MD for 3 months from 2 April 2026.

news.title:
SAIL (₹156) is recommended as a buy, with a target price of ₹175, supported by technical breakout above ₹153.
Sensex rose 1.7% to 73,134.3, Nifty gained 1.6% to 22,679.4, driven by global market rally and easing crude prices.
news.summary:
SAIL (₹156) is recommended as a buy, with a target price of ₹175, supported by technical breakout above ₹153.
Sensex rose 1.7% to 73,134.3, Nifty gained 1.6% to 22,679.4, driven by global market rally and easing crude prices.

news.title:
Emkay favors SAIL, Jindal Steel in ferrous, Vedanta in non-ferrous; highlights rising steel prices due to geopolitical tensions.
Aluminium benefits from supply disruption; Vedanta poised for gains. Nifty Metal index fell 11% since Mar 2026 but shows resilience.
news.summary:
Emkay favors SAIL, Jindal Steel in ferrous, Vedanta in non-ferrous; highlights rising steel prices due to geopolitical tensions.
Aluminium benefits from supply disruption; Vedanta poised for gains. Nifty Metal index fell 11% since Mar 2026 but shows resilience.

news.title:
SAIL sees a 27.9% surge in open interest, rising to 60,267 contracts.
The rise, with robust volume and price uptick, signals bullish investor interest.
news.summary:
SAIL sees a 27.9% surge in open interest, rising to 60,267 contracts.
The rise, with robust volume and price uptick, signals bullish investor interest.

news.title:
India eases restrictions for Bharat Heavy Electricals, SAIL to procure Chinese equipment.
Relaxation follows equipment shortages and delays after 2020 border clash restrictions.
news.summary:
India eases restrictions for Bharat Heavy Electricals, SAIL to procure Chinese equipment.
Relaxation follows equipment shortages and delays after 2020 border clash restrictions.

news.title:
A parliamentary panel urged SAIL to improve revenue realisation, expand its steel grades portfolio, and enhance market competitiveness.
SAIL must modernize plants, reduce losses, secure raw materials, and expand capacity to 50 MTPA by 2047.
news.summary:
A parliamentary panel urged SAIL to improve revenue realisation, expand its steel grades portfolio, and enhance market competitiveness.
SAIL must modernize plants, reduce losses, secure raw materials, and expand capacity to 50 MTPA by 2047.

news.title:
Mid, smallcap indices plunged; Nifty Midcap 100 fell 3.5% and Nifty Smallcap 100 dropped 3.8%.
Stocks like Muthoot Finance, Voltas, SAIL, Paytm, and Firstcry declined over 5% amid global geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Mid, smallcap indices plunged; Nifty Midcap 100 fell 3.5% and Nifty Smallcap 100 dropped 3.8%.
Stocks like Muthoot Finance, Voltas, SAIL, Paytm, and Firstcry declined over 5% amid global geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
SAIL surged 5.7% intraday on 17 Mar 2026, reaching Rs 153.25.
This rise outpaced sector and market, rebounding after 3 days of decline.
news.summary:
SAIL surged 5.7% intraday on 17 Mar 2026, reaching Rs 153.25.
This rise outpaced sector and market, rebounding after 3 days of decline.

news.title:
Prostarm Info secures Rs 6.71-cr order from SAIL for 2MW AC solar rooftop system.
The project involves supply, installation, and commissioning across SAIL plant buildings.
news.summary:
Prostarm Info secures Rs 6.71-cr order from SAIL for 2MW AC solar rooftop system.
The project involves supply, installation, and commissioning across SAIL plant buildings.

news.title:
SAIL has 20–25 days propane supply; steel production stable despite West Asia concerns.
Steel imports dropped 37% YoY post safeguard duty; domestic output, consumption growing steadily.
news.summary:
SAIL has 20–25 days propane supply; steel production stable despite West Asia concerns.
Steel imports dropped 37% YoY post safeguard duty; domestic output, consumption growing steadily.

news.title:
CCI probes Tata Steel, JSW Steel, SAIL, and RINL for alleged cartel behavior via WhatsApp chats and production cuts.
Investigation reveals synchronized price changes, controlled production cuts, implicating top executives; firms deny wrongdoing.
news.summary:
CCI probes Tata Steel, JSW Steel, SAIL, and RINL for alleged cartel behavior via WhatsApp chats and production cuts.
Investigation reveals synchronized price changes, controlled production cuts, implicating top executives; firms deny wrongdoing.

news.title:
Metal stocks, including Tata Steel, SAIL, NMDC, plunged 5-8% as Nifty Metal dropped 5%, driven by geopolitical tensions and strong US dollar.
Analysts expect near-term pressure for the sector, with 11,650 as support and 12,100 as resistance; cautious approach advised.
news.summary:
Metal stocks, including Tata Steel, SAIL, NMDC, plunged 5-8% as Nifty Metal dropped 5%, driven by geopolitical tensions and strong US dollar.
Analysts expect near-term pressure for the sector, with 11,650 as support and 12,100 as resistance; cautious approach advised.

news.title:
Metal stocks surged 7% as US tariff uncertainty boosted buying momentum.
Analysts suggest buying on dips with potential upside of up to 25%.
news.summary:
Metal stocks surged 7% as US tariff uncertainty boosted buying momentum.
Analysts suggest buying on dips with potential upside of up to 25%.

news.title: Emkay raises SAIL's target price to ₹200, citing strong earnings recovery.
news.summary: Emkay raises SAIL's target price to ₹200, citing strong earnings recovery.

news.title:
SAIL redesignates Manish Raj Gupta as Director (Mining) effective February 18, 2026.
The post was earlier titled Director Technical Projects and Raw Materials.
news.summary:
SAIL redesignates Manish Raj Gupta as Director (Mining) effective February 18, 2026.
The post was earlier titled Director Technical Projects and Raw Materials.

news.title:
SAIL approaches court and CCI for detailed findings on alleged steel cartelisation.
CCI suspects cartelisation in the steel industry; SAIL receives notice from the regulator.
news.summary:
SAIL approaches court and CCI for detailed findings on alleged steel cartelisation.
CCI suspects cartelisation in the steel industry; SAIL receives notice from the regulator.

news.title:
Vedanta, Hindalco, JSW Steel, Tata Steel may react to US tariff rollback plans on steel, aluminium.
BHEL won LoA from SAIL for power plant; Bharti Airtel's unit got RBI nod as NBFC Type II.
news.summary:
Vedanta, Hindalco, JSW Steel, Tata Steel may react to US tariff rollback plans on steel, aluminium.
BHEL won LoA from SAIL for power plant; Bharti Airtel's unit got RBI nod as NBFC Type II.
